# <type>(<scope>): <short summary under 72 chars>
#
# Types: feat | fix | refactor | docs | chore | test | perf
# Scope (optional): web | cli | template | schema | ci | deps
#
# Body (optional — wrap at 72 chars):
# Explain WHY, not what. What does this enable?
# List anything non-obvious or that a reviewer needs to know.
#
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# RULES FOR THIS REPO
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# - No AI session URLs (e.g. claude.ai/code/session_...)
# - No internal planning notes or task IDs
# - No .env values, credentials, or personal data
# - No "Co-authored-by: Claude" or similar AI attribution lines
#   (unnecessary; the code speaks for itself)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
#
# Examples:
#   feat(web): add PDF preview iframe to CV page
#   fix(cli): handle missing end date in experience entry
#   chore(deps): bump puppeteer to 22.6.0
